name: status-alert
purpose: Inline status alert block (info/success/warning/error) in Nimiq style: tinted background + border, circular icon chip, and message text. Used for transaction status, network notices and error feedback.

props.name: type
props.description: Alert severity; selects the Nimiq tint color (blue/green/orange/red) and icon.

props.name: message
props.description: Alert text. The default slot overrides it when provided.

notes: No upstream Vue component exists (vue-components has no Alert); source of truth is the nimiq-ui skill example 04-status-alerts.html section 1 (ALERT BLOCKS), copied verbatim. Sample state: three stacked alerts — success, warning, error. Colors are Nimiq palette tints: blue #0582CA, green #21BCA5, orange #EC991C, red #D94432 at 0.08 bg / 0.2 border / 0.15 icon-chip alpha; text always navy #1F2348. Upstream quirk preserved: the icon SVGs draw with stroke=currentColor while the CSS only sets fill, so the glyph strokes render in the inherited navy text color, not the tint color. Vue port is a faithful wrapper written for this registry (script setup, type prop picks variant + built-in icon, message prop/slot).
